name: Golden Potato Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Cut the potatoes lengthwise into wedges.
3. Sprinkle with some of your favorite salt-free seasoning mix. Garlic powder and paprika are good choices.
4. Bake on a nonstick baking sheet for 45 to 60 minutes, or until they are easily pierced with a fork.
